name: Basic automatic Gmail email labelling with OpenAI and Gmail API
description: Gmail auto-categorizer: fetches recent emails from Gmail, uses Claude AI to categorize each by urgency and type, and posts a structured categorized summary to Slack using Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Basic automatic Gmail email labelling with OpenAI and Gmail API

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of recent emails to categorize (default: 10)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the categorized summary

code.source:
const messages = $.steps.listEmails.response.messages || [];
return { messageIds: messages.map(m => m.id).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 10) };

steps.name: Build Slack Block Kit categorized summary
